evals.expected_output: Application entry created in LeanIX with verified data from parallel research
assertions: Read WORKFLOW.md before starting
Read all 11 guidelines from ../guidelines/ directory
Execute exactly 13 parallel queries in Step 1 (8 Perplexity + 5 WebFetch)
All 13 queries executed in a SINGLE message (true parallelism)

Conflicts are resolved using documented resolution rules

Hosting type determined using decision tree from guidelines
SSO status researched from 5+ sources including changelog
category field set to 'businessApplication'
deprecated field set to 'No' with capital N
collectionStatus field set to 'inReview'
asOfDate field set to current date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)
Quality check validates all criteria before Step 4
Application created or updated in LeanIX via MCP
Custom fields updated via Python CLI (create-provider/main.py)
Final report shows confidence scores and conflict resolutions
Execution completes without delegating to subagent
